subjects.description: An oncoming vehicle in the opposite lane, identifiable mainly by its intensely bright high-beam headlights piercing through the darkness; the body of the car is obscured behind the glare, only faint hints of a dark sedan silhouette visible around the light source
subjects.appearance_details: Two blinding white-blue headlight pools with lens-flare star artifacts, halation, and bloom, mirrored into shimmering reflections on wet asphalt; faint amber side marker glow
subjects.relationship: The source of glare impairing the ego vehicle's visibility; travels directly opposite the ego on the shared wet boulevard
subjects.location: center to slightly left of frame, approaching from background to midground
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame growing to Medium within frame as it nears
subjects.orientation: Front-facing toward the camera, headlights aimed directly at the ego viewpoint
subjects.action: Approaching on the opposite lane with high beams on, then passing by
subjects.state_changes: Grows brighter and larger as it emerges from the bend, mirrored in the wet asphalt, peaks in glare at closest approach, then sweeps past to the left and recedes, glare clearing

subjects.description: The ego vehicle itself, represented only by its interior dashboard edge and the forward illumination of its own headlights spilling onto the road ahead
subjects.appearance_details: Faint dashboard reflection along the bottom edge of the frame, twin cones of headlight light spreading over the asphalt and lane markings
subjects.relationship: The point-of-view vehicle through which the entire scene is observed
subjects.location: implied at camera position, dashboard at bottom foreground
subjects.orientation: Facing forward down the road in the driving direction
subjects.action: Driving the wet boulevard, rounding a gentle bend, then continuing while slowing and resuming speed
subjects.state_changes: Decelerates significantly during peak glare, then accelerates back to nominal cruising speed

background_setting: A tree-lined European boulevard at night just after rain, a gently curving two-lane road of wet fresh asphalt mirroring warm street lamps and lit shopfronts between rows of spring-leafed trees. A center line and cobble gutters edge the road; puddles hold trembling reflections. The clouds are breaking to a few stars. The boulevard bends gently right ahead, the curve briefly hiding then revealing the oncoming lane amid the wet reflections. Beyond the lamps the wet street recedes into glistening dark.

lighting.conditions: Post-rain night with warm street lamps and lit shopfronts; wet fresh roadway
lighting.direction: Ego headlights front-lit; intense oncoming high-beam glare emerging from the rightward bend, mirrored in puddles
lighting.shadows: Soft doubled shadows from lamps, mirrored downward in the wet asphalt
lighting.illumination_effect: Wet asphalt mirrors lamps and shopfronts into shimmering vertical reflections; oncoming high beams add overwhelming bloom, wet-scattered starburst flares, and washout doubled in the puddles

aesthetics.composition: Boulevard curving right near mid-frame between trees, oncoming glare emerging and mirrored upper-center and in puddles, dashboard edge at bottom
aesthetics.color_scheme: Wet-black asphalt and warm lamp amber with spring green foliage, cut by harsh white-blue headlight glare mirrored below
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Tense, glistening, disorienting, momentarily blinding, cautious after rain
aesthetics.patterns: Mirrored lamp reflections and cobble gutter lines sliding past on wet asphalt

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward dashcam tracking along the wet boulevard, gentle swing into the right bend, deceleration drift then re-acceleration
cinematography.framing: Wide shot of the road ahead from driver viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Road and mirrored markings ahead, though glare overwhelms focus at peak brightness

context: Demonstration of nighttime oncoming-headlight glare and driver visibility management on a tree-lined boulevard

actions.description: Ego vehicle drives the wet boulevard at nominal speed, distant oncoming headlights appear faint around a gentle rightward bend
Vehicle rounds the bend; oncoming high beams rapidly intensify, mirrored in the wet asphalt with glare and lens artifacts
Ego vehicle slows significantly to manage impaired visibility as the oncoming car passes on the left
Glare clears, wet boulevard becomes visible again, ego vehicle resumes nominal speed

segments.description: Driving the wet boulevard at steady speed with faint oncoming light growing around a gentle bend
segments.key_changes: Distant headlights begin to appear, mirrored in puddles
segments.camera: Forward tracking with a gentle swing into the bend

segments.description: Rounding the bend as oncoming high beams flare into severe glare doubled in the wet asphalt
segments.key_changes: Rapid increase in brightness, bloom and wet-scattered starburst artifacts wash across the frame
segments.camera: Lateral swing through the bend, then straightening onto the road ahead

segments.description: Ego vehicle slows for the passing car, then glare clears and nominal speed resumes
segments.key_changes: Deceleration, oncoming vehicle sweeps past left, artifacts fade, wet boulevard regains visibility, re-acceleration
segments.camera: Slight forward dip during braking, then smooth resumed forward tracking

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam view shows a tree-lined boulevard at night after rain, ego headlights and mirrored lamps over wet fresh asphalt while a faint glow appears around a gentle rightward bend. By 0:01 the vehicle enters the bend and a pair of oncoming high beams rapidly brightens, doubled in the puddles. Through 0:02-0:03 the view is overwhelmed by white-blue glare, wet-scattered lens flares, and bloom. Around 0:03 the ego slows noticeably to cope with impaired visibility as the oncoming car sweeps past on the left. From 0:04 to 0:05 the glare clears, the wet boulevard reappears, and the ego accelerates back to nominal cruising speed.
audio_description: Steady low hum of the engine and wet tire hiss on fresh asphalt, rising then dipping as the vehicle decelerates. Dripping trees and eaves, a faint whoosh of the oncoming vehicle passing, quiet post-rain town; no music or speech.
